title: glyceria australis
intro: Glyceria australis, also known as Southern mannagrass or Glyceria, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Glyceria australis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy. Glyceria australis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
